text: As I step into this space, bathed in neon and ideas, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with uncertainty. The atmosphere is charged with curiosity—there’s an invitation to think deeper about the intersection of humans and technology. Yet, the starkness and sharp boundaries make me feel slightly self-conscious, as though my presence is being studied as part of the experimentation that surrounds me. Am I part of the exhibit, or merely an observer reflecting on my own role?
